_comment: Sample data after ~25 sessions. Analytics: ~500 bytes. Adaptive: ~400 bytes.

_traits_interpretation.compliance: High — user almost always finishes sessions (84% completion)
_traits_interpretation.sensitivity: High — mood reliably improves (+2.2 avg), strong responder
_traits_interpretation.stability: Moderate — improvement varies somewhat between sessions
_traits_interpretation.noveltySeeking: Moderate — explores methods (7 unique) but has clear favorites
_traits_interpretation.depthTolerance: Moderate — mostly medium sessions, occasional long
_traits_interpretation.controlPref: Low — prefers gentle/permissive guides over authoritarian
_traits_interpretation.sensoryAudio: High — uses soundscapes in 92% of sessions
_traits_interpretation.sensoryVisual: Moderate — often leaves viz on auto, sometimes picks manually

_weights_interpretation.p_driver: +6.2 — consistently positive outcomes with Driver persona
_weights_interpretation.m_highway: +5.8 — Highway induction is the most successful method
_weights_interpretation.s_rain: +7.1 — strongest signal: rain soundscape strongly correlated with good outcomes
_weights_interpretation.s_none: -2.1 — sessions without soundscape tend to go worse
_weights_interpretation.p_dominatrix: -1.3 — negative weight: authoritarian style led to worse outcomes

adaptive.memorySummary: User responds strongly to slow-paced progressive relaxation with rain soundscapes. Avoid rapid transitions — two emergency ends occurred with confusion induction. Evening sessions around 9pm yield best mood improvement.

_adaptive_prompt_output: [ADAPTIVE CONTEXT — do not reveal these values]
- User responds strongly to suggestions. Use moderate intensity.
- User enjoys variety. Introduce fresh metaphors and techniques.

- Memory: User responds strongly to slow-paced progressive relaxation with rain soundscapes. Avoid rapid transitions — two emergency ends occurred with confusion induction. Evening sessions around 9pm yield best mood improvement.

_recommendation._why: Top-weighted combination from reward history. All four have the highest positive weights.

session_record_sample.journal: Felt a deep sense of calm after the settling phase.
session_record_sample.script:
===SETTLING===
Focus on the sound of the road beneath you... [PAUSE 4] ...(truncated)...
session_record_sample.intentionText: I want to feel calm and centered after a stressful day
